items.title: ‘Fuck you, Bambu’: How one private message could change the face of 3D printing
items.summary: Bambu Lab makes the best, most accessible 3D printers yet, but that reputation is suddenly under siege. It all started when Paweł Jarczak received a private message from the com...

items.title: 4chan’s Misogynist ‘Wizards’ Are Nudifying Women by Request
items.summary: As nonconsensual explicit deepfakes continue to proliferate online, entire communities are now collaborating on this digital form of sexual abuse.
